creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text: Note the patch misspells 'ccache'. I also am unsure if this is worth doing as it implies that any of these can be used as a drop-in which isn't the case. Using ccache-*-static requires more setup than bsd.ccache.mk supports; which is to say that it is not intended to be a dependency but to *already be installed* in the system somewhere.
